title: EMM 数据库记录
completionRule: Complete only when the reviewed AST prototype and scripted legacy characterization are preserved; every allowlisted source raw field, stable sorting/filtering, field labels, typed formatting, path/URL actions, formatted/raw and copy controls, loading/error/refresh lifecycle, accessibility and responsive evidence are covered. The bounded Reader DTO must remain explicitly versioned and must not be described as an arbitrary SQLite row.

unsupportedNodes.replacement: Production React must derive field metadata and the original row value before rendering semantic cells and actions.
XR renders the authenticated, versioned and bounded raw-record DTO through TanStack Table while retaining the legacy projection fallback for older backends.

sourceUiInventory.title: 原始字段库存和标签
acceptanceItems: 读取 emmMetadata.raw 的非空字段
字段按 key 稳定排序
bundleSize/category/coverHash/coverPath 字段元数据
createdAt/updatedAt/mtime 日期字段元数据
exist/filecount/filepath/filesize/hash 字段元数据
hiddenBook/id/mark/pageCount/posted/readCount 字段元数据
title/title_jpn/type/url/rating/status/date 字段元数据
未知字段回退原 key 和 string 类型

sourceUiInventory.title: 过滤、排序和计数
acceptanceItems: 字段和值共用大小写不敏感过滤
过滤输入保持紧凑高度
显示原始记录总条数
字段和值表头可排序
过滤和排序不改变原始 DTO

sourceUiInventory.title: 按字段类型格式化
acceptanceItems: 文件大小按 B/KB/MB/GB 格式化
rating 保留一位小数
datetime 使用本地时间
timestamp 按秒转换本地时间
boolean 显示是或否
无效值保留原始文本
tooltip 保留完整 key 和 value

sourceUiInventory.title: 路径、URL、复制和视图动作
acceptanceItems: path 字段使用可操作按钮在文件管理器定位
url 字段使用可操作按钮打开外部链接
切换格式化和原始 JSON 视图
复制单个字段值
复制完整原始记录
显式刷新当前记录
只读字段与可编辑入口清晰区分

sourceUiInventory.title: 空、加载、错误、生命周期和几何
acceptanceItems: 当前条目无 EMM 记录显示独立空态
加载状态不伪装为无记录
失败显示 alert 和显式重试
隐藏或卸载取消请求
表格最大高度 192px 并滚动
字段列和值列保持紧凑密度
长值截断且完整值可访问
窄 Card 无横向溢出

items.title: 有界原始 EMM 记录 DTO
items.targetContract: Expose a bounded, versioned and read-only projection of the matched external Mangas row with explicit field types, omission rules and source identity through the authenticated Reader metadata boundary.
items.notes: ReaderBookMetadataService requests includeRaw only for the once-per-session static metadata load. The authenticated HTTP contract proves the bounded schemaVersion 1 DTO, omission of unknown source properties and per-session request reuse. The readonly external store selects a fixed allowlist, caps fields and scalar lengths, and leaves directory batch hydration on the existing lightweight projection. The React Card explicitly labels legacy servers as a compatibility projection.

items.title: Reader 已验证字段投影
items.targetContract: Render only validated current-book fields and bounded tag rows, omit undefined values and keep filtering pure without parsing arbitrary database JSON in React.
items.notes: The authenticated metadata boundary exposes only the versioned typed field DTO and omits unknown source properties. Legacy servers remain supported through the bounded compatibility projection without parsing database JSON in React.

items.title: 字段和值过滤
items.targetContract: Filter the visible bounded rows by case-insensitive key or value text without mutating source order or issuing a new backend request.
items.notes: Filtering is local, case-insensitive across key, label, raw and formatted value, preserves the source DTO and exposes a distinct filtered-empty state.

items.title: 字段和值排序
items.targetContract: Provide stable keyboard-operable sorting for key and value columns while retaining canonical source identity.
items.notes: TanStack Table owns stable key/value sorting with named keyboard-operable headers; sorting consumes derived rows and never mutates emmRaw.

items.title: 字段标签和类型格式化
items.targetContract: Apply the source field-label map and deterministic path, URL, datetime, timestamp, byte-size, number and boolean formatting while preserving raw values in accessible descriptions.
items.notes: The versioned DTO carries explicit scalar types. The Card restores field labels and deterministic bytes, rating, boolean, datetime and seconds-timestamp formatting while retaining invalid raw text and full values.

items.title: 格式化/原始视图与复制
items.targetContract: Switch between the formatted table and bounded raw JSON, copy a field or the complete record and report clipboard failures without exposing unbounded database content.
items.notes: A compact segmented control switches the derived table and bounded raw JSON. Field and full-record copy reuse the authenticated host clipboard capability with named controls and feedback.

items.title: 路径、URL 与显式刷新动作
items.targetContract: Use authenticated host capabilities for path reveal, safe external URL opening and explicit metadata refresh with capability-aware disabled and error states.
items.notes: Path fields use the authenticated revealSystemPath command. URL fields use a dedicated authenticated host command backed by the maintained open adapter; the service allowlists bounded credential-free HTTP/HTTPS URLs and rejects unsafe schemes before platform dispatch. Explicit refresh reuses the shared static metadata retry path.

items.title: 加载、无记录、错误与重试
items.targetContract: Distinguish no active book, loading, no matched record, empty raw row, recoverable failure, retry and filtered-empty states without leaking stale data across sessions.
items.notes: No-book, loading, no-record, recoverable alert/retry and filtered-empty states are distinct; shared metadata retry replaces the failed snapshot without a second Card-specific cache.

items.title: 共享静态元数据与隐藏取消
items.targetContract: Share one static metadata request with sibling Cards, perform zero hidden work and cancel or ignore stale results on deactivation, session replacement or unmount.
items.notes: Hidden Cards perform zero work, sibling Cards share one request, repeated HTTP metadata reads reuse the per-session backend load, and session replacement aborts the stale client request before publishing only the new session result.

items.title: 表格、过滤和字段动作语义
items.targetContract: Expose a named filter, semantic table headers, full key/value text for truncated cells and keyboard-operable sorting, copy, path, URL, refresh and retry commands.
items.notes: Filter, view mode, sortable headers and field commands have accessible names; cells expose formatted labels while title and raw JSON retain complete source values. Desktop and constrained Chromium exercise keyboard activation of the URL command.

items.title: 紧凑表格和受限 Card 几何
items.targetContract: Preserve the compact filter/count/table hierarchy, sticky header, bounded scrolling, typed cell affordances and full-value tooltips without horizontal overflow at desktop and constrained widths.
items.notes: The scripted 1920x1080 legacy baseline freezes the 380px filter/count/table hierarchy, typed formatting and 192px scroll bound. Desktop and 420px target screenshots prove the extended controls preserve compact geometry without horizontal overflow.

items.title: 记录安全投影不是原始 SQLite 行
items.targetContract: Expose the reviewed versioned allowlist as a bounded raw-record DTO, label the legacy fallback separately and never expose arbitrary SQLite columns or unbounded values to the browser.
items.notes: The accepted replacement preserves every reviewed legacy field category through a fixed allowlist, explicit scalar types, 64-field and 4096-character bounds, schemaVersion 1 and a clearly labelled compatibility fallback. Unknown source columns never cross the authenticated HTTP boundary.
